name: Landings
description_short: Landings Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative offering checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and credit cards with competitive rates and personalized service.
description_long:
Landings Credit Union is a federally-insured credit union (NCUA-insured) operating as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution. The organization serves consumers seeking alternatives to traditional banks with an emphasis on member benefits and community-focused lending practices. Routing number 322173149 indicates full banking infrastructure and clearing capabilities.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including deposit accounts (checking, savings, money market accounts up to 1.50% APY), share certificates up to 4.00% APY, auto loans as low as 5.49% APR with 90-day payment deferral on refinances, personal loans up to $2,000 with payments from $100/month, home financing with current free appraisal promotions, and a Visa rewards credit card at rates starting at 9.25% APR. They also provide vehicle shopping through dealer partnerships and are launching a "Buy Now, Pay Later" feature for checking account holders.

Landings distinguishes itself through specialized lending products like Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU/Casita) financing for multi-generational family housing, targeted promotions (such as $50 new checking account bonuses), and transparent rate disclosures on their homepage. The organization invests in member financial education through blog content covering scam prevention, digital security, and money management for teens and adults.

The credit union operates primarily as a membership-based lender with eligibility requirements typical of credit unions. Members gain access to competitive rates and personalized service, though eligibility for membership is not fully detailed on the homepage. Limited branch location information is visible on the landing page, suggesting physical presence exists but requires navigation to discover hours and locations.
services: Checking accounts with new member $50 bonus promotion
Auto loans with refinancing options and 90-day payment deferral
Home purchase and refinance mortgages with free appraisal promotion
Vehicle shopping and financing through dealer network
Buy Now, Pay Later feature (coming soon)
pros: Money market accounts offering 1.50% APY and share certificates up to 4.00% APY with competitive rates displayed prominently
Auto loans as low as 5.49% APR with 90-day payment deferral promotion on refinances
Personal loans up to $2,000 with manageable monthly payments starting at $100
Home financing with free appraisal promotion up to $650 and specialized ADU/Casita lending for multi-generational housing
New member incentive of $50 bonus for opening checking account ("Hey Bestie" promotion)
Integrated vehicle shopping platform through dealer partnerships with easy financing
Educational blog content on financial security, scam prevention, and money management
NCUA federal insurance protection on deposits
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not clearly explained on homepage, potentially limiting access for some consumers
Limited visibility of branch locations and hours on main landing page requires additional navigation
Buy Now, Pay Later feature listed as "Coming Soon" with no launch timeline provided
No clear information about membership fees or account minimum balance requirements visible on homepage
Auto loan rates advertised as low 5.49% APR may not be available to all applicants depending on creditworthiness
best_for: Existing or prospective credit union members seeking competitive deposit rates and loan products
Homebuyers and homeowners interested in mortgage refinancing or home improvement financing
Consumers seeking auto loan refinancing with 90-day payment deferral benefits
Families exploring accessory dwelling unit (ADU) financing for multi-generational housing arrangements
diagnosis: Landings Credit Union is best for consumers who qualify for membership and seek competitive rates on deposits and loans from a member-owned cooperative institution. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility requirements are not transparently disclosed on the homepage, and interested parties must contact the credit union directly to confirm qualification.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Landings — Credit Union in TEMPE, AZ | CreditDoc
meta_description: Landings — NCUA-insured credit union in TEMPE, AZ. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
